appInformation.contentRights: ImagePet uses original app UI/assets and third-party open source libraries listed in docs/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.
appInformation.ageRating: Complete the ASC questionnaire; expected low-age rating because the app has no user-generated content, networking, accounts, ads, purchases, gambling, or unrestricted web access.
appInformation.price: Recommended 1.0 launch pricing: paid app, USA base price USD 7.99; introductory sale option USD 4.99 for the first 7-14 days; raise to USD 9.99 only after review volume and release confidence improve. Use Apple's automatic comparable prices for other storefronts unless a territory-specific strategy is intentionally defined.

appPrivacy.reviewRequirement: Re-check this before submission against the actual linked SDKs and any support/contact flow.

recommendedFirstSet: Main Soft Native compression workspace with files queued or completed.
Drag-and-drop empty state with mascot visible.
Completed batch showing saved space and per-file results.
Settings showing output, notifications, or folder watching.
Desktop Pet visible beside the main app.
captureRequirements: Do not show private image names or personal folders.
Do not promise unsupported formats or cloud features.
Keep captions factual and short if adding marketing frames.
Prefer a clean light-mode set first; dark-mode screenshots can be added only if they look polished.

submissionChecklist: Xcode Cloud build branch produced an ASC build.
Version number and build number match docs/PROGRESS.md.
App icon is final in the submitted build.
Product page copy pasted and proofread.
App Privacy answers match the actual binary and dependencies.
Final manual smoke passed from the exact ASC build.
